heading: Examples
body:
The following examples demonstrate index definitions on the fields in the
`sample_mflix.movies` collection. If you load the collection on your
cluster, you can create the example indexes using the Visual Editor or
the JSON (Javascript Object Notation) Editor in the Atlas UI or using [mongosh](mongodb-shell).***➤ Use the **Select your language** drop-down menu to set the
interface for the example on this page.***drivers
